# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: "0.0.0.0"
      port_value: 9901

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address: { address: "0.0.0.0", port_value: 10000 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        config:
          codec_type: AUTO
          stat_prefix: ingress_tcp
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: service-router
              domains:
              - "*"
              routes:
                - match: { prefix: "/" }
                  route:
                    cluster: some_service
  clusters:
  - name: some_service
    connect_timeout: 0.25s
    type: strict_dns
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: some_service
      endpoints:
        lb_endpoints:
          endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address: { address: "192.168.0.1", port_value: 3547 }
http_filters:
- name: envoy.health_check
  config: {}

access_log:
- name: envoy.file_access_log
  config:
    path: /tmp/envoy_access.log
stat_prefix: service_1
